[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 01101101 5
1 01101000 3
2 01101000 3
3 11011111 7
4 11010010 4
5 11000011 4
6 10111001 5
7 01101000 3

01 10010010 3
12 00000101 2
23 00000000 a
34 00100000 1
45 11010010 4 match 4
56 00000001 1
67 00101110 4
70 00000000 a

24 00100000 1

46 01010001 3
57 00001100 2

40 00000000 a
51 00000000 a

73 10010001 3

05 11010010 4 match 4
